name: pchat-mvp
description: HeyCursor Commander-Worker MVP — multi-agent orchestration for Cursor Composer sessions.

scripts.check: node --check src/core/store.mjs && node --check src/core/persistence.mjs && node --check src/core/task-engine.mjs && node --check src/core/workgroup.mjs && node --check src/mcp-server.mjs && node --check src/local-ui.mjs && node --check src/cli.mjs && node --check src/cdp-driver.mjs && node --check src/watchdog.mjs
scripts.cdp: node -e "import('./src/cdp-driver.mjs').then(m => m.connect(m.createCdpDriver()).then(r => console.log('CDP connected:', r)).catch(e => console.error(e.message)))"
scripts.watchdog: node -e "import('./src/watchdog.mjs').then(m => { const wd = m.createWatchdog({ activeWaits: new Set() }); m.startWatchdog(wd); console.log('Watchdog started'); })"
